summary: Verified image-migration bug fix (external CDN -> same-origin /assets/*.png), price change to ₹550, and brand-red CTAs (#CB2323). All 4 same-origin image URLs return HTTP 200 with correct content-type. All 4 DOM images render with naturalWidth > 0 and complete=true: nav-logo (184x60), hero-book-cover (623x867), title-page-img (760x1222), signature.png (loaded as resource entry, 43720 bytes). SignatureIntro overlay appears on load and auto-dismisses within ~3.2s. Hero interactive book 3D tilt works (rotateX/rotateY change on mousemove, book image stays visible during tilt). Backend /api/inventory returns {price_inr:550,total:1500,...}. Full reservation flow succeeded end-to-end via UI: filled TEST form, submit -> form-success visible with edition '№ 0021 / 1500' and reserved count 20 -> 21. All 3 CTAs (nav-reserve-cta, hero-reserve-cta, form-submit) render with backgroundColor rgb(203,35,35) == #CB2323. Zero console errors, no failed image requests. Backend pytest: 9/9 pass (test file expected 1499 -> updated to 550 to match spec).

minor.issue: Returns 200 instead of 201 Created (REST convention nit, carried from iter1/iter2)
edition_number computed via non-atomic aggregate count -> theoretical duplicate edition numbers under concurrent submits (carried from iter1/iter2)

critical_code_review_comments: server.py reservation flow still uses aggregate-then-insert (non-atomic) — should use findOneAndUpdate on a counter document or a MongoDB transaction to guarantee unique edition numbers under concurrency.
server.py reservation should return HTTP 201 Created instead of 200 OK (REST convention).
SignatureIntro replays on every full reload — consider sessionStorage flag if repeat visitors should skip it.
InteractiveBook onMouseMove updates React state on every event — fine on desktop but could be requestAnimationFrame-throttled for lower-end devices.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_reservations.py (updated expected price 1499 -> 550 to match current spec)
test_credentials: N/A — no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: One TEST_ reservation created during flow test (edition #0021). Reserved count now 21/1500 (1479 remaining). No cleanup endpoint exists.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Image bug fix verified: /assets/logo.png, /assets/book.png, /assets/signature.png, /assets/title-page.png all served from same origin (200 OK). Price is ₹550 everywhere. Brand red is rgb(203,35,35). Reservation count is at 21; still plenty of headroom to 1500. Wait ~4s after page load for signature intro to auto-dismiss before interacting. Form uses data-testids form-full-name, form-email, form-phone, form-city, form-address, form-pin, form-submit, form-success, form-success-edition.
rca of the issue: Original user report 'I can not see any images' — root cause was external CDN URLs (customer-assets.emergentagent.com) previously used in InteractiveBook/SignatureIntro/Nav/Edition. Fix applied by main agent: images downloaded to /app/frontend/public/assets/ and component src paths updated to /assets/*.png. Testing confirms all 4 images now return 200 from same origin with correct content-type=image/png and expected byte sizes, and all render in the DOM with naturalWidth > 0.
